elements.text: Convention-over-configuration: any git repo with an agent.yaml becomes a GitAgent
Inheritance: extends → clone parent → deep-merge manifests     Dependencies: clone into .gitagent/deps/ via git tags

HTTP :3333 + WebSocket upgrade
Browser UI (ui.html) — Chat / Files / Integrations
audio · video_frame · text messages

query() · tool() · loadAgent()
startVoiceServer() · createSandboxContext()
initLocalSession()
src/sdk.ts — the single entry point for all interactions

Returns AsyncGenerator<GCMessage> + abort() · steer() · sessionId() · manifest() · messages()
Channel<T> for backpressure: push() / pull() / finish()  ·  QueryOptions: prompt, dir, model, tools, hooks, sandbox

assistant (content,
  thinking, usage, cost)
user · tool_use · tool_result
system (start/end/error)
delta (text | thinking)

extends: → clone parent → deep-merge manifests → union tools/skills
dependencies: → clone into .gitagent/deps/ via git tags

State: systemPrompt · model
  tools[] · messages[]
  isStreaming · thinkingLevel
Methods: prompt() · subscribe()
  steer() · followUp() · abort()

agent_start → session_start
text_delta → delta(text)
thinking_delta → delta(thinking)
message_end → assistant msg
tool_exec → tool_use/result
agent_end → session_end

id · name · api · provider · baseUrl
reasoning · input: (text | image)[]
cost: { input, output, cacheRead, cacheWrite } per 1M
contextWindow · maxTokens

messages[]
 → transformContext() (prune to fit window)
 → convertToLlm() (filter unsupported)
 → provider.stream() (HTTP/SSE)
 → AssistantMessage + usage + cost
Sandbox mode swaps: cli → sandbox-cli · read → sandbox-read · write → sandbox-write  (→ machine.execute / readFile / writeFile)

Script-based: hooks/hooks.yaml
  spawn("sh", [script]) · JSON stdin/stdout · 10s timeout
Programmatic: GCHooks interface (callbacks)

Events: on_session_start · pre_tool_use
  post_response · on_error
Actions: allow · block (+ reason) · modify (args)

MultimodalAdapter interface
OpenAI Realtime: gpt-4o · VAD 800ms · frame injection
Gemini Live: 2.5 Flash · 24↔16kHz resample · video

Client → Server: audio · video_frame · text
Server → Client: audio_delta · transcript
  tool_call · tool_result · agent_working/done
src/composio/ — native fetch, no SDK dependency

ComposioClient: REST v3 wrapper
  listToolkits · searchTools · executeTool · initiateConnection
ComposioAdapter: Composio → GCToolDefinition[] · 30s cache
  naming: composio_{toolkit}_{slug}
  SEND → use directly · DRAFT → only when asked
OAuth: authConfig → initiate → popup → callback
Tools injected via searchTools() semantic matching
All loaded by Agent Loader → injected into system prompt or available at runtime
Optional peer dependency · Turns any GitAgent into a stateless VM that can run anywhere

Agent logic · tools · model calls
System prompt · hooks · compliance
Drives the agent loop inside the VM
No state held — reads from git

Git credentials (clone/push access)
API keys injected at VM start
Composio OAuth tokens
No secrets baked into the image

Ephemeral VM · Machine (abstract) → E2BMachine
execute() · readFile() · writeFile()
Sandbox boots → clone repo → checkout branch
VM is disposable — all state lives in git
VM is fully disposable — git is the only persistence layer. Any new VM can resume from the branch.

Each agent session = a git branch
Natural isolation — no shared filesystem state
Full history — every action is a commit
Merge results via pull request
Reconnect: GitMachine.connect(sandboxId)
whileRunning() — transparent pause/resume across VMs

Run anywhere: any E2B-compatible host, any cloud, any region
